name: speckit-pro
description: Skill-backed Spec-Driven Development workflows for Codex, including coaching, setup, autopilot execution, status dashboards, and PR review resolution.

interface.longDescription: Skill-backed Spec-Driven Development for Codex. Each Codex skill ships its own `agents/openai.yaml` metadata sidecar, and the autopilot uses Codex-native multi-agent orchestration for coaching, setup, execution, status dashboards, and PR review remediation.
defaultPrompt: Use SpecKit Pro to coach Spec-Driven Development and explain the next step for my current spec.
Use SpecKit Pro to set up a spec worktree and prepare the workflow for autopilot.
Use SpecKit Pro to run a populated workflow file with Codex-native built-in or registered agents.
